scripts.seed: docker compose -f docker-compose.development.yml --env-file .env exec backend npx prisma db seed
scripts.migrate:dev: docker compose -f docker-compose.development.yml --env-file .env exec backend npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.migrate:prod: docker compose -f docker-compose.production.yml --env-file .env exec backend npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix frontend && npm run lint --prefix backend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
